originalTitle: The film about Sam Altman has been dropped by Amazon MGM
summary: Luca Guadagnino's film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM. The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023 spanning Altman's termination and reinstatement as CEO, had been in the works for about a year. The cast also includes A Complete Unknown actress Monica […]
content: Luca Guadagnino’s film about OpenAI CEO Sam Altman, Artificial, has reportedly been dropped by Amazon MGM.  The film, which stars Andrew Garfield and covers the rollercoaster five days in 2023 spanning Altman’s termination and reinstatement as CEO, had been in the works for about a year. The cast also includes A Complete Unknown actress Monica Barbaro as OpenAI CTO Mira Murati, Ike Barinholtz as Elon Musk, and Anora’s Yura Borisov as OpenAI chief scientist Ilya Sutskever. In a statement to Deadline, the studio said it believes the movie “will be better served if it were released by a different studio and is working closely with the filmmaking team to find the film a new home.” Puck first reported the studio’s decision not to release the film. Amazon and OpenAI also have close ties, with Amazon in February announcing a $50 billion investment in the AI lab.
chineseTitle: 关于山姆·奥特曼的电影已被亚马逊米高梅公司下架
chineseSummary: 据报道，卢卡·瓜达尼诺 (Luca Guadagnino) 执导的关于 OpenAI 首席执行官山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的电影《Artificial》已被亚马逊米高梅公司下架。这部由安德鲁·加菲尔德 (Andrew Garfield) 主演的电影讲述了 2023 年奥特曼终止首席执行官职务和复职期间的五天过山车故事，这部影片已经制作了大约一年。演员阵容还包括《完全未知》女演员莫妮卡 […]
chineseContent: 据报道，卢卡·瓜达尼诺 (Luca Guadagnino) 执导的关于 OpenAI 首席执行官山姆·奥尔特曼 (Sam Altman) 的电影《Artificial》已被亚马逊米高梅公司下架。  这部由安德鲁·加菲尔德 (Andrew Garfield) 主演的电影讲述了 2023 年奥特曼 (Altman) 终止首席执行官职务和复职期间的五天过山车故事，该片已筹备了大约一年。演员阵容还包括《完全未知》女演员 Monica Barbaro 饰演 OpenAI CTO Mira Murati，Ike Barinholtz 饰演 Elon Musk，Anora 的 Yura Borisov 饰演 OpenAI 首席科学家 Ilya Sutskever。该工作室在给 Deadline 的一份声明中表示，它相信这部电影“如果由不同的工作室发行，效果会更好，并且正在与电影制作团队密切合作，为这部电影找到一个新家。”帕克首先报道了工作室不发行这部电影的决定。亚马逊和 OpenAI 也有着密切的联系，亚马逊在 2 月份宣布对人工智能实验室投资 500 亿美元。
whyItMatters: 这条信息属于 AI 与科技趋势信号，适合用于观察工具选型、产品机会、开发者关注点和技术路线变化。
